Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see my regular face reflected in the mirror.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see my tired face reflected in the mirror.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see my healthy-looking face[n]reflected in the mirror.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see my normal face reflected in the mirror.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see myself reflected in the mirror.[n]I look more alive than ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see myself reflected in the mirror.[n]I seem to be radiating a special aura.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see an attractive reflection capable[n]of capturing people's hearts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_CLOSET_0406
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should put my stuff away[n]and go to bed early...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GO_TO_BED_0406
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see my tired face reflected in the mirror.[n]I should go to sleep early today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GO_TO_BED_0407
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see myself reflected in the mirror.[n]Anyway, I should go to bed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see myself reflected in the mirror.[n]I look terribly unwell...[n]{f 1 1}
